final_endpoint_decision.claim: B0 remains the current frozen connected baseline, not a final balanced KG or solved endpoint.

limitations: high entity count relative to triple count
not accepted as a final balanced KG

branch_decisions.summary: Connected, covers all 139 allocated relations, duplicate-free, frozen and audited. Retained because no better registered candidate exists, not because it is optimal or balanced.
Deletion can improve allocation balance in this tested stress endpoint, but connectivity collapses into thousands of weak components. This does not prove no connected balanced alternative exists.
Strict allocated replacement did not find useful feasible replacements in the bounded tested evidence. This does not prove all replacement methods fail globally.

Observed unallocated auxiliary edges can preserve full connectivity and allow limited pruning. Diversity reranking fixes P17 concentration, but marginal utility remains weak and the branch remains auxiliary-dependent and not canonical allocation-faithful.
Verified symmetry, inverse, and composition rules produced no synthetic cut-crossing bridge alternatives in the bounded frozen audit. This does not prove all synthetic methods fail globally.

answered_hypotheses.answer: not feasible under the bounded tested frozen evidence
mechanically feasible locally but weak at endpoint scale
fixes C5-H2 P17 concentration but not auxiliary dependence
no synthetic candidates found under bounded frozen evidence

unresolved_hypotheses: broader H3 source scope or alternate bridge-cut target sets
live WDQS exploratory evidence, non-canonical until frozen and audited
whether auxiliary edges should ever be included in final benchmark evaluation
future multi-objective construction jointly optimizing connectivity and balance
whether a better registered candidate can be produced by a new construction method
safe_claims: B0 is the current frozen connected baseline
B0 has unresolved balance and sparsity limitations
B0 remains useful as a downstream evaluation baseline only if limitations are reported
later branches provide bounded diagnostic evidence
C5-H2 shows auxiliary observed edges can help locally but does not solve the global endpoint trade-off
H3 found no synthetic pattern-derived bridge alternatives in the bounded frozen audit
Full end-to-end reproducibility remains incomplete where live WDQS, LLM, or exact dashboard export sessions are missing
unsafe_claims: B0 is the final balanced KG
B0 solves the KG construction problem
bounded tests prove all alternatives fail globally
Auxiliary edges are canonical allocated triples
Unobserved synthetic triples are Wikidata facts
The registry should be updated for C5-H2 or H3 now

registry_decision.reason_registry_unchanged: No better registered candidate exists; B0 is not retained because it is optimal.
notes: Probe-only branches remain evidence, not selected graph candidates.

options: downstream KGE evaluation using B0 as a limited connected baseline
thesis integration describing B0 as provisional, connected, and limited by balance/sparsity issues
recommended_next_direction.constraint: Do not keep generating branches without a new testable hypothesis.
